item.title: Poolside发布Laguna S 2.1开源权重编程模型，性能超越十倍体量竞品
item.summary: Poolside, the San Francisco AI lab that has spent most of its three-year existence quietly selling coding models to governments and defense agencies, released its most capable model to date on Tuesday — and made an unusually aggressive bet that radical transparency, not raw scale, is how a smaller lab competes at the f
